extract: Molten Arena (Japanese: 溶岩の戦場 Lava Battlefield) is an area located in the northeastern region Cobalt Coastlands of Hisui. It is found at the center of Firespit Island. It is the place where the noble Arcanine, Lord of the Isles (Japanese: 島キング King of the Island), resides. As part of Mission 10: "The Lordless Island", a Hisuian Growlithe that is the son of the late Lord of the Isles evolves here after confronting the Miss Fortune sisters and becomes the new noble. The newly evolved Arcanine is then fought here to calm him of his frenzy. Warden Palina of the Pearl Clan tends to the new lord Arcanine here.
